Meaning.Vi: Bán buôn; số lượng lớn, giá sỉ
Meaning.En: Relating to the sale of goods in large quantities, typically to retailers rather than directly to consumers.
Meaning.Example: The store sells electronics at wholesale prices to other businesses.

Situation.Vi: Mô tả sản phẩm được bán với giá thấp hơn vì mua số lượng lớn.
Situation.En: Describing goods sold at lower prices due to bulk purchasing.

Meaning.Vi: Việc bán buôn; hàng bán buôn
Meaning.En: The practice of selling goods in large quantities, or the goods themselves sold in this way.
Meaning.Example: They specialize in wholesale distribution of household appliances.

Situation.Vi: Công ty chuyên phân phối hàng hóa theo lô lớn cho các cửa hàng bán lẻ.
Situation.En: A company that distributes goods in bulk to retail stores.

Meaning.Vi: Bán buôn; bán số lượng lớn
Meaning.En: To sell goods in large quantities, typically to retailers or other businesses.
Meaning.Example: The manufacturer wholesales its products to distributors across the country.

Situation.Vi: Hãng sản xuất bán hàng với số lượng lớn cho nhà phân phối.
Situation.En: A manufacturer sells large quantities of goods to distributors.
